assertions.title: Course status change menu

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard
Plan creation page with chat interface

steps.action: Submit plan request for SMC to UCLA CS
steps.observed: Rate limit error from OpenRouter API

assertions.issues: OpenRouter API rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) prevents AI plan generation. Without a generated plan, course status menu cannot be tested.

assertions.title: Failed/cancelled courses visually distinct

steps.action: Attempt to create plan and mark courses as failed/cancelled
steps.observed: Cannot create plan due to rate limiting

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-RECOVER-001 - no plan available to test course status visual distinctions

assertions.title: Completed course adjusts remaining plan

steps.action: Attempt to create plan and mark course as completed
steps.expected: Remaining units decrease, course visually distinguished
steps.observed: Cannot create plan due to rate limiting

assertions.issues: Blocked by VAL-RECOVER-001 - no plan available to test completed course behavior

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (20 req/min, 50 req/day) is too restrictive for testing. Multiple test attempts quickly exhaust the daily limit.

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded - AI plan generation is unavailable. The API returns 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' error. Free tier limits: 20 requests/minute, 50 requests/day.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited 30+ seconds between requests, but daily limit already exhausted from previous tests

summary: Tested 0 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. All assertions blocked by OpenRouter API rate limiting that prevents plan generation. The rate limit (50 req/day on free tier) was exhausted from previous testing activities. Auth flow works correctly - user account was successfully created.
